testcase.name: Agregar producto al carrito

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for By.xpath: (//button[contains(text(),'Add to cart')])[1] to be present (tried for 5 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: driver.version: unknown
